# Maison Affluency

> Singapore's premier destination for museum-grade, investment-worthy collectible furniture from world-class European designers. Private showroom in District 9.

## About

Maison Affluency is a curated luxury design gallery based in Singapore, specialising in collectible furniture, bespoke interiors, and contemporary design by world-renowned designers and ateliers. Founded with a passion for exceptional craftsmanship, the gallery bridges emerging talents and established design masters with discerning collectors across Asia-Pacific.

## Location

- Address: 1 Grange Garden, #16-05, Singapore 249631
- District: Orchard / District 9
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10 AM – 7 PM
- Phone: +65 9139 3850
- Email: concierge@myaffluency.com

## Services

- **Private Showroom**: By-appointment curated viewing experience
- **Trade Program**: Exclusive B2B programme for architects, interior designers, and luxury hospitality professionals — trade pricing, dedicated client advisors, bespoke quotations, custom sourcing, samples & swatches, and consolidated insured shipping
- **Provenance Certificates**: Documentation of authenticity and provenance for collectible pieces
- **Custom Requests**: Global connections to specialist workshops and renowned designers for bespoke solutions

## Featured Designers & Makers

Okha Design Studio (Adam Courts), Alexander Lamont, Alinéa Design Objects (Léo Aerts), Apparatus Studio, Atelier Fevrier, Atelier Pendhapa, Bina Baitel, Atelier BdM (Bruno de Maistre), Emmanuel Levet Stenne, Entrelacs Creation (Yves Macheret), Charles Paris (Felix Agostini), Robicara (Francesco Caracciolo di Marano), Forest & Giaconia, Garnier & Linker, Hamrei, Jean-Michel Frank, Jeremy Maxwell Wintrebert, Kerstens (Andy Kerstens), Leo Sentou, Made in Kira (Roman Frankel), Man of Parts, Milan Pekař, Nathalie Ziegler, NDL Editions (Noé Duchaufour Lawrance), Olivia Cognet, Pierre Bonnefille, Reda Amalou, Thierry Lemaire, Tristan Auer

## Categories

Collectible furniture, lighting, decorative objects, bespoke interiors, contemporary design, couture furniture, artisan craftsmanship
